title: SACRAMENTO
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: The subscription economy is on track to reach a $1.5 trillion market by 2025.
An average of 42% of consumers continue to pay for subscriptions they no longer utilize.
Continuing to pay for unused subscriptions costs consumers approximately $133 more each month.
Many companies fail to remind consumers of upcoming renewals, leveraging forgetfulness to boost profits.
AB 2863 will help people keep the approximately $133 they spend each month on subscriptions they don’t use.
